text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Booooo! I lost! This totally suuucks!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Big yikes... What a joke... All I can do is laugh.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
choice_data_list: You can still bounce back from this!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
What? What should I do, then? If you're just
throwing empty words at me, I'm gonna go off on
you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I break down the reasons she lost today and the
areas she needs to improve. If we can address
those properly, she should definitely be able to
win the next race.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Aghh! Stop! Stop already! It doesn't matter how
much you ramble, it's not like I get what you're
talking about!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Basically, let's just meet up at the track after we
get back. ☆

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm telling you I want you to teach me while I'm
running. I totally get that you're giving this a lot
of thought, okay?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
So let's start as soon as we get back to the
academy. Don't be late!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It appears that Tosen Jordan has gotten her drive
back. Afterward, we begin training seriously.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
The point of running is to win. That's why we're
working so hard.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I can't consider myself cool unless I get first place!
choice_data_list: Then let's be cool and get first next time!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
That goes without saying. There's no way I'm
going out on an L note.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna show everyone how much my running
slaps! Let's gooooo!
